title: Vendor in latest github.com/projectatomic/buildah
body:
This adds support for Dockerfile.in and fixes some limits
issues on docker build

Also adds support for podman build to read Dockerfile from stdin.

cat Dockerfile | podman build -f - .

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Damn it, Homu let in another commit with a bad signoff
Hold merging this for a second so I can get the gitvalidation epoch updated
